case_title: HANG DUONG VS. TREVOR JOHN SOUZA ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-19-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HAN DUONG IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER/DAUGHTER, NGA DUONG. DEFENDANTS ARE NOT PRESENT. NO PROOFS OF SERVICES ON FILE. INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
